title: Add a unique constraint to prevent duplicate daily reports
prompt: The worker in `test_fixtures/no_unique_report_worker.ex` has no uniqueness configuration, so clicking 'Generate report' twice enqueues two identical jobs. Add a `unique:` block that dedupes on `report_id` and `date` for 24 hours (`period: 86_400`). Include the full safe `:states` list that matches Oban's recommended default (keeping `:available` in the list). Otherwise keep the module unchanged. Write the result to `lib/my_app/workers/daily_report_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Adding a single `unique:` block with named keys is a one-line change once you know the option exists.
research_citation: Oban unique_jobs HexDocs — 'You should always specify a period, otherwise Oban will default to 60 seconds.'
